case_title: JOHNSON, DAVE VS WALKER, PAMELA J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,518.24 FILED BY JOHNSON, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, PAMELA J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO A COURT DATE BEYOND THE 70 DAYS REQUIRED BY CCP.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, PAMELA J.
DEFT'S REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT WAS SUBMITTED WITH ORDER FOR COMMISSIONER'S APPROVAL. $10.00 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-24-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-09-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES BY DEFT WITHOUT A SHOWING OF GOOD CAUSE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK FANNY RAYRAY; NOT REPORTED. (DEPARTMENT506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, PAMELA J. $4,131.20 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,231.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DAVE AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, PAMELA J.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, PAMELA J.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, PAMELA J.
